# Eric Strohmaier

> Independent software engineer ("software partner") who builds custom software,
> internal tools, automations, and high-converting websites for small and
> mid-sized businesses (KMU) in Austria, Germany, and worldwide - software
> designed to cut costs, save hours, and bring in revenue.

Languages: English (/en) and German (/de). German-speaking visitors (AT/DE) are
served the German site by default.

## What Eric does
- Custom software development (dashboards, CRMs, booking & payment flows)
- Internal tools & automations that replace manual busywork and fragile spreadsheets
- AI tools tailored to a business's real workflows
- Revenue websites & lead systems (high-converting sites, lead capture, follow-up)
- Ongoing software partnership: maintenance, monitoring, monthly improvements

## Engagement options
- Website Care Plan - EUR 249/mo (managed, conversion-focused website)
- Software Partner - EUR 2,500/mo (a senior developer on call, month to month)
- Custom Software - from EUR 5,000/project (scoped up front, clear outcome)
- All month-to-month, no lock-in. Start with a free call.

## Selected work & products
- PromptSloth - own product; 7,000+ users and ~$3K revenue in 9 months on organic search alone.
- AutoReview (https://getautoreview.com) - SaaS that automates Google-review collection for local service businesses.
- Friends in Flats - first technical hire; built the platform to 20,000+ users and led a 4-person team.
- One client: grew revenue 270% by rebuilding their SEO.
